summary: Comprehensive testing completed. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Contractor registration specialty dropdown causing infinite loop/blue screen - replaced Radix UI Checkbox with custom checkbox to prevent double onClick event handling. All other features tested and working: Manager login, Dashboard, all navigation pages, Mobile sidebar logout, Contractor portal, Admin dashboard, Public pages (Blog, About, Privacy, Terms), Landing page.

bugs_fixed.bug: CRITICAL: Contractor registration specialty dropdown causes blue screen (infinite loop)
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Radix UI Checkbox component had onCheckedChange handler that conflicted with parent div onClick handler, causing 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error when clicking specialties
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Replaced Radix UI Checkbox component with a custom div-based checkbox that only handles click via parent div onClick, preventing double event handling. Added pointer-events-none equivalent behavior

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Contractor registration specialty selection was causing infinite loop error ('Maximum update depth exceeded') due to double onClick handling from both parent div and Radix Checkbox onCheckedChange. Fixed by replacing Checkbox component with custom div-based checkbox. All major features tested and working. Rate limiting is active - 5 failed login attempts will lock out for 5 minutes.
